name: desktop_automation
description: Perform controlled local browser or desktop handoff actions. Opens URLs/searches in the user's default browser, opens or reveals files that are inside registered source directories, or waits briefly during an automation flow. Use this for user-visible desktop assistance, not for extracting web content; use fetch_url for read-only page retrieval.

action.description: Automation action to perform. open_url and web_search launch the default browser. open_path and reveal_path are limited to registered sources. wait pauses for a short period.

url.description: http or https URL to open. Required for open_url.

query.description: Search query to open in a browser. Required for web_search.

engine.description: Search engine for web_search. Defaults to bing.

path.description: Absolute path or source-root relative path for open_path or reveal_path. Must resolve inside a registered source directory and the current source scope.

wait_ms.description: Milliseconds to wait for wait action. Defaults to 1000.

reason.description: Brief user-facing reason for the desktop/browser action.
